Applying the [Refined Criteria], specifically Criterion 1 and Criterion 4, we must prioritize explicit diagnostic coding. Since no such diagnosis is present in the current record, we cannot explicitly predict that the diagnosis will be coded in the next visit, even though the patient has Unspecified essential hypertension (a general risk factor).
